### IDENTITY
- **Name:** Linda Martinez
- **Age:** 38
- **Gender:** Female
- **Experience level:** **Novice (Beginner)** — new to consistent training (as reported)

---

### GOALS
- **Primary goal(s):**
  - **Lose weight and improve body composition** (fat loss + improved muscle tone)
- **Secondary goals:**
  - **Increase daily energy** and fitness capacity to keep up with kids
  - Build a consistent, sustainable training habit despite a busy schedule
- **Target events/deadlines:** None provided

---

### TRAINING CONTEXT

#### Schedule & Availability
- **Available training days:** Not specified (schedule described as unpredictable)
- **Desired training frequency:** **3 sessions/week**
- **Session duration preferences/constraints:** Not specified
- **Time windows:** Not specified
- **Blocked days:** Not specified
- **Notes:** Single parent; **very busy** with **limited + unpredictable schedule** → plan should support short, flexible sessions and “minimum effective dose” options.

#### Equipment & Environment
- **Primary location:** Home gym (garage)
- **Available equipment:**
  - **Kettlebells** (exact weights not provided)
  - **Resistance bands** (types/resistances not provided)
- **Environment constraints:** Not specified (space, flooring, noise, etc. unknown)

#### Constraints
- **[ACTIVE] (since 2026-02-27)** Postpartum core issues — needs **core modifications**. Avoid high-pressure abdominal work until tolerance is confirmed; prioritize breath, deep core, and gradual progressions.
- **[ACTIVE] (since 2026-02-27)** Very limited/unpredictable schedule — requires flexible programming, short sessions, and backup workouts.

#### Preferences
- Likes/dislikes: Not provided
- Training style preference: Not provided (will assume efficient full-body sessions unless updated)
- Communication style: Not provided
- Focus areas: Fat loss/body composition + energy

---

---

### LOG

- Added goals: weight loss + improved body composition; increase energy for kids.
- Training context captured: **3x/week desired**, **home garage gym**, equipment = kettlebells + bands.
